createrailgrinding.ponder.rail_grinding_: Diving Boots are suitable Grind Shoes and can used for Rail-Grinding
Right-click Train Tracks with an empty hand to start Rail-Grinding
Right-click Train Tracks with an empty hand to stop Rail-Grinding
Sneak and Jump near Train Tracks is another way to start Rail-Grinding
Hold and Release Jump to leap off Rails
Holding Shift+Sneak will automatically make you latch on to Rails
Fall Damage is negated and Momentum is maintained when landing on Rails
effect.createrailgrinding.railgrindboost: A motivating sugary treat that _Boosts_ your _Rail-Grinding Skills._
enchantment.createrailgrinding.railgrind: Allows you to Rail-Grind on Train Tracks
item.createrailgrinding.diving_boots.too: Grants the ability to _grind_ on the rails of _Train Tracks._ _Interact (R-Click)_ with _Train Tracks_ on an empty hand, or hold _Sneak_ and _Jump_ while near _Train Tracks._
Hold _Sneak_ to accelerate. Hold _Jump_ to leap off the rail. _Interact (R-Click)_ _Train Tracks_ to stop.
key.categories.createrailgrinding: Rail Grinding Overrides (Toggled in Client Config)
